title: cleistes bella
intro: Cleistes bella, also known as the Pink Fairy Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and inflammation, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cleistes bella include relief from coughs, colds, and flu, as well as reduced inflammation and improved respiratory function. Cleistes bella can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
